allow: PowerShell(py -c "import pandas, numpy, plotly, sklearn; print\('all deps ok'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(& "E:\\python\\python.exe" -m pip install streamlit pandas numpy plotly scikit-learn 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8501" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "App RUNNING - $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "App DOWN - restarting..."; Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\python\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501 --server.headless true" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\Career Help AI\\DS360"; Start-Sleep 8; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8501" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Restarted - $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Still down: $_" } })
